title: Machine learning accelerates enzyme stability screening
abstract: This article reports an automated workflow for enzyme stability screening with benchmark data and external validation.

title: Automated enzyme stability screening with external validation
abstract: The study describes machine learning assisted screening of enzyme variants and reports validated stability measurements.

title: Review of machine learning for enzyme engineering
abstract: This review summarizes recent machine learning approaches for enzyme engineering.

title: Dataset note for molecular benchmark curation
abstract: This paper describes a benchmark dataset but does not report external validation.

title: Clinical language model evaluation under deployment drift
abstract: This original research article evaluates language models under deployment drift using prospective validation.
